preconditions: Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before starting the workflow.

testCases.title: Open Login page from Home page guest state using person/profile button
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state with no authenticated user identity visible.
Click the person/profile button from the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page guest state to the Login page and the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible and interactive.

testCases.title: Validate Login page controls visibility and interaction state after opening from Home page
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Click inside the Username field.
Click inside the Password field.
Verify the Login, Back, and Home buttons can be interacted with.
testCases.expectedResult: The Username and Password fields accept focus and input interaction, and the Login, Back, and Home buttons are visible and enabled on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify password input is masked during typing
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page using the person/profile button.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Observe the displayed characters in the Password field while typing.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks the entered password characters during input and the plain text password value is not visibly displayed.

testCases.title: Login successfully with approved credentials and return to authenticated Home page
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Enter username krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter password Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user and returns to the Home page in authenticated state with authenticated user identity display and authenticated-only feature area visible.

testCases.title: Reject login with invalid username and invalid password
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter invalid username invaliduser into the Username field.
Enter invalid password WrongPassword1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, the user remains unauthenticated, and the application does not transition to authenticated Home state.

testCases.title: Reject login with blank username and blank password
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Leave the Username field empty.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and only the generic Failed message is displayed without separate required-field validation messaging, while the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page or equivalent unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Reject login with populated username and blank password
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter username krisadmin into the Username field.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and only the generic Failed message is displayed without separate required-field validation messaging, while the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Reject login with blank username and populated password
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Leave the Username field empty.
Enter password Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and only the generic Failed message is displayed without separate required-field validation messaging, while the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify all failed authentication attempts display the same generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Submit invalid credentials using invalid username and invalid password.
Observe the failure message.
Clear the fields and submit with both fields blank.
Observe the failure message again.
Clear the fields and submit with only one credential populated.
Observe the failure message again.
testCases.expectedResult: Each failed authentication attempt displays the same generic Failed message and no alternate or detailed validation messages are shown.

testCases.title: Return to Home page in unauthenticated state using Back button
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Click the Back button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page without authenticating the user and authenticated-only UI is not visible.

testCases.title: Return to Home page in unauthenticated state using Home button
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Click the Home button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page without authenticating the user and authenticated-only UI is not visible.

testCases.title: Validate login behavior with leading whitespace in username
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter username with leading spaces before krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter password Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles the credential values according to implemented whitespace business behavior and the resulting authentication state and any Failed message are observable and consistent.

testCases.title: Validate login behavior with trailing whitespace in username
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter username krisadmin followed by trailing spaces into the Username field.
Enter password Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles the credential values according to implemented whitespace business behavior and the resulting authentication state and any Failed message are observable and consistent.

testCases.title: Validate login behavior with leading whitespace in password
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter username krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter password with leading spaces before Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles the credential values according to implemented whitespace business behavior and the resulting authentication state and any Failed message are observable and consistent.

testCases.title: Validate login behavior with trailing whitespace in password
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter username krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter password Carwash#1 followed by trailing spaces into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles the credential values according to implemented whitespace business behavior and the resulting authentication state and any Failed message are observable and consistent.

testCases.title: Validate whitespace-only submission in Username and Password fields
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Username field.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails with the generic Failed message only, the user remains unauthenticated, and no separate required-field validation message is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify invalid password with valid username does not authenticate user
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter username krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter invalid password WrongPassword1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, and the application remains in unauthenticated state without showing authenticated Home UI.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username with valid password does not authenticate user
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter invalid username wronguser into the Username field.
Enter password Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, and the user remains unauthenticated.
